description: ATOM (ROCm/ATOM, 'AiTer Optimized Model') version eras for the code-map indexer. ATOM is a young, lightweight vLLM-like engine adapted from nano-vllm; the Python package lives under atom/ and authoritative docs under docs/. Internal module paths are best-effort -- the linked docs/ guide for each area is authoritative.

eras.label: Initial public releases
eras.note: Package `atom/` (entrypoints, engine, layers, models), docs/ guides, recipes/, tools/. Built on AITER; ROCm-only.

how_to_read: ATOM is new and evolving; layouts use a single era. Each area links its authoritative docs/ guide plus best-effort atom/ module paths -- confirm against the checkout.
